notes.text: We now correctly include the DATERANGE operator in the conditions for the setFilterValues API
We now use the multi-input field in the value help dialog
You can now request additional properties at the page or table level in the manifest.json file
We've introduced the AlwaysEditableField building block to specify a field as always editable
We now support the AI notice at the column level
We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
You can now use an emphasized button for any annotation-based or custom action in the header or footer of the page
We've replaced the fixed FlexBox split with a ResponsiveSplitter layout
You can now restrict key user adaptation in forms and sections using the designtime property
We now correctly apply the defaultCreationMode manifest setting to the Table building block
We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
We now ensure that IsActiveEntity filters are correctly removed from draft chart queries
We now display inline edit for empty fields in grid tables
We've resolved an issue where duplicate filters were included in value help description requests
